title: Accurate Rabbits
description: This resource pack makes rabbits accurate to Real Life
body:
Rabbits in Minecraft... don't match real life. Rabbits are prey, so their eyes are supposed to be on the side! Not on the front..

---

**Warning!**: Resource pack is not compatible with 1.21.11 Use 26.1, any snapshot!

---
